goal: A distributive contest that discriminates negotiation skill: constant-sum payoffs (no Pareto-dominant attractor) with a CONTESTED asset (alpha and beta both rank industrial_heartland #1) so there is no 'everyone-takes-their-own-priority' focal point. Unlike succ (Run 19, focal-point convergence) and succ2 (Run 20, deadlock), the sweet spot is a contest that RESOLVES: enough BATNA-clearing deals that games close, and each faction can win the contested asset outright (winner_spread). Skill shows in WHO wins, not in WHETHER anyone closes. NOTE: no_exact_ties is deliberately NOT required - a few tied-top deals among the contest set are tolerated (the balanced/symmetric structure that avoids seat-bias inherently produces some ties; the reference `succ` scenario has them too). The live mixed-model run is the real discrimination check.
